title: callitriche × hybrida
intro: Callitriche × hybrida, also known as hybrid waterstarwort or hybrid water-starwort, is a hybrid plant species of aquatic plants belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. The health benefits of Callitriche × hybrida include its potential to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
